text: Flying spores - attacks entities with a beam attack, dealing a some negative effect to them.
Planting mushrooms - plants mushrooms that impose negative effects within range with spores.
Mushroom saturation - gives saturation to the player for a while.
$(o)Condition:$() Mushrooms or mushroom blocks within 16 blocks.
Fly Agaric Toxin: +10% damage; 15% chance to apply "Nausea IV" for 20 sec.
Porcini Stem: 15% chance to restore 4 hunger points when hit.
